Surveys News My Weekly Column for the Mid Sussex Times Saturday, 2 May, 2026 My team and I are very excited to be holding my latest local Women in Leadership Business Breakfasts on Friday 15th May, 7:30am – 9:30am. Register for tickets via - https://mims-womens-business-breakfast.eventbrite.co.uk Ladies - do start your day with inspiration, new connections, and an opportunity to come together, share ideas, challenges and crucially support local growth and boost positivity...
